ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current status of the order */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing address for the order */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order shipment */,
  "payment_confirmation" INTEGER /* Confirmation of payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES order_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_billing_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("billing_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  "loyalty_program" INTEGER /* Participation in loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Customer segment (e.g., premium, regular) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the order status (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer the address belongs to */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., Shipping, Billing) */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address was last updated */,
  "address_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product included in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "item_price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  "product_variant" TEXT /* Variant of the product (e.g., size, color) */,
  "item_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "product_specs" TEXT /* Product specifications (e.g., dimensions, materials) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, customer service, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_comments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking entry */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order being tracked */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was delivered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., in transit, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_tracking_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order being paid for */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
